metadata.name: Localization
metadata.description: Guides > Adding a new language. Six sections + TOC + next-reads. Corrects two factual errors from the earlier draft: there is no `jui localize` CLI (it's all `jui build`), and Android does NOT get a StringManager.kt (it emits res/values[-lang]/strings.xml natively). Walks the bilingual shape, namespace derivation, per-platform output asymmetry, Web-only reactive language switching, the 5 mechanical steps to add a locale, and current limits (no plurals, no pseudo-loc, %@/%s interpolation auto-convert).

methods.name: onAppear
methods.description: Seed nextReadLinks from the module-scope NEXT_READ_ENTRIES catalog (two rows: next_spec_first -> /guides/writing-your-first-spec, next_concepts_data_binding -> /concepts/data-binding) and stamp currentLanguage from StringManager.language. Each row's titleKey / descriptionKey is resolved through StringManager with the guides_localization_ namespace prefix.

methods.name: onNavigate
methods.description: Client-side navigation via router.push(url). Destinations are the spec-mapped URLs enumerated in transitions: /, /guides/writing-your-first-spec, /concepts/data-binding.

vars.name: nextReadLinks
vars.description: Two closing 'read next' cards pointing at /guides/writing-your-first-spec and /concepts/data-binding. Seeded by onAppear from the NEXT_READ_ENTRIES static catalog and re-seeded by onToggleLanguage.

notes: Live Guides entry. Flip GUIDES_ENTRIES row for 'localization' to 'live' in HomeViewModel when shipping.

Six sections: (1) bilingual shape with JSON excerpt, (2) namespace naming rules with derivation table, (3) per-platform output (iOS StringManager.swift + Localizable.strings, Android strings.xml only — NO StringManager.kt, Web StringManager.ts), (4) Web-only reactive setLanguage with real TS toggle example, (5) five-step locale addition with JSON + bash excerpts per step, (6) limits (no plurals / no pseudo-loc / %@ ↔ %s auto-convert).

Corrects prior false claims: 'jui localize' CLI does not exist (localisation is part of jui build), 'No per-platform .strings / strings.xml maintenance' misstates Android reality, 'whole screen re-renders on setLanguage' is true for Web only.
Deprecated strings: section_add_* / section_scale_* / toc_row_add / toc_row_scale remain in strings.json as unreferenced dead entries to minimise cross-session merge risk.
